generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunding our military puts our nation at risk. The recent cuts have left our troops with outdated equipment and stretched thin resources. We can't afford to wait for another crisis to act. It's time to increase defense spending to ensure our national security and protect our civil liberties. #SupportOurTroops #NationalSecurity
